description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with clean lines and large glass windows dominating the front facade. The structure is two stories tall, with a prominent staircase leading up to the main entrance, which is flanked by a covered carport on one side and a spacious patio area on the other. The exterior is surrounded by tall, slender trees arranged symmetrically along the perimeter, providing both privacy and aesthetic appeal. The rear of the house includes a balcony and expansive glass doors that open onto the patio, which is furnished with an umbrella and outdoor seating. The roof is a combination of gable and flat sections, adding architectural interest and variety to the silhouette. The overall color palette is neutral, with white and light gray surfaces complemented by the green of the surrounding trees.
description: A modern two-story house with large glass windows, a prominent staircase, and a mix of gable and flat roofs, surrounded by tall, slender trees and featuring a spacious patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a staircase, large glass windows, a covered carport with a visible car, and a patio with an umbrella and seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, balcony, and the symmetrical row of tall trees along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gable roof, large windows, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees along the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall, continuation of the tree line, and partial view of the patio and balcony.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide staircase, glass door, and is flanked by a covered carport and patio, with no porch or columns.
